FORM 10-Q

Item 2. Management's Discussion and Analysis

Net sales for the third quarter of 2024 were $85.8 billion, an increase of $4.0 billion, or 5%, from the same period in 2023.

Services net sales increased 14% during Q3 2024, driven by higher revenue from advertising, the App Store, and subscription services.

Item 3. Quantitative and Qualitative Disclosures About Market Risk

There have been no material changes in market risk from the disclosures provided in the most recent 10-K.

Item 4. Controls and Procedures

Management evaluated the Company's disclosure controls and procedures.
